title: Sorting Medium first
excerpt: My importance (priority) column is sorting by low and by medium when I toggle the sort function. I want it to toggle between low and high. What am I doing wrong?

posts.author: nanomax (Neil Anderson)
posts.cookedHtml: My importance (priority) column is sorting by low and by medium when I toggle the sort function. I want it to toggle between low and high. What am I doing wrong?
